title: Timeless
description: Brings back old/removed features to new versions
body:
Timeless is a mod that re-implements old features for people like me that don't like some of the changes Mojang made.

Timeless includes:
- The old Create New World menu
- The old Hit Direction
- A clunk sound when pistons can't extend (feature that never got in the game)
- Skeletons shooting purple arrows (like in beta)
- The old creative inventory
- The old Potion Colors and Glint
- The old Window Icons
- The old Bat model
- The old screen background
- Removes the environmental fog

This mod **requires** Cloth Config and Fabric API. ModMenu is optional but highly recommended.
